creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
Hi,

https://pkg.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:13:aarch64/latest/ is missing *.pkg 

for example, compare pkg.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:13:aarch64/latest

Index of /FreeBSD:13:aarch64/latest/
File Name  ↓ 	File Size  ↓ 	Date  ↓ 
Parent directory/	-	-
All/	-	2021-Jan-27 05:20
Latest/	-	2021-Jan-27 05:20
meta.conf	163	2020-May-16 06:24
meta.txz	916	2021-Jan-27 02:49
packagesite.txz	5522356	2021-Jan-27 02:49

with pkg.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:13:amd64/latest/

Index of /FreeBSD:13:amd64/latest/
File Name  ↓ 	File Size  ↓ 	Date  ↓ 
Parent directory/	-	-
All/	-	2021-Dec-08 16:47
Latest/	-	2021-Dec-08 16:47
meta.conf	163	2020-Feb-13 23:51
meta.pkg	916	2021-Dec-08 15:42
meta.txz	916	2021-Dec-08 15:42
packagesite.pkg	6723612	2021-Dec-08 15:42
packagesite.txz	6723612	2021-Dec-08 15:42
